You know you really want a muffin.
Send a correction
Post Comment
Easy Peasy Lemon Squeezy
QuoteReply
# Feb 27 2019 at 2:39 PM Rating: Decent
mosquitoe
Scholar
23 posts
Easiest way with two toons...
Main toon requiring faction shrouds to a good old rogue, hides & sneaks.
Second toon purchases muffins and hands them to the shrouded rogue.
Shrouded rogue hands in muffins for his/her faction.
Nuff said.

Exxodia 110 Beastlord
Mitheriana 110 Necromancer
Agaia 110 Druid
▲ Page top
Update of Muffin for Druid 1.0 Epic
QuoteReply
# Oct 26 2016 at 11:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1699229794474
4 posts
As of 10/26/2016 I can confirm the muffins will still function to raise your standing so that you can start the druid epic 1.0 quests.

You can buy Muffins in PoK (or at any bakery merchant) for around 1 gold per stack.
Pandos Flintside is the dwarf you need to feed in West Freeport.

For those who are running live, Pandos can take a whole stack of muffins at one time and will give you the appropriate faction gain. No need to turn in 1 at a time.

If you hail Telin and he only says "Hello, wanderer"..... Just (/Say What Action) and he will give you the note you need.

I can't confirm that he will take a whole stack for those running P99.

Hope this helps,

Regards,

Adain King

Edited, Oct 27th 2016 1:16am by AdainKing
▲ Page top
Update on Muffins and the Druid Epic 1.0
QuoteReply
# Dec 29 2009 at 4:27 PM Rating: Decent
Wertaf
11 posts
My wife Arbrah just completed the first step of the druid epic 1.0. Her faction was too low with Talsin Darkforest, the first NPC in the epic, who told her she had to prove herself first. So she went to East Freeport, located Inkeeper Nasumi at the Freeport Inn, and bought 360 muffins in stacks of 20, all she had room for in her bags.

On the advice of a guildmate, she then located a dwarf named Pandos (didn't get the last name) in West Freeport. He conned indifferent at the beginning. It took 100 muffins to get him to con amiable, then another 100 or so to con kindly, and another 100 or so to con warmly.

She returned to Talsin Darkforest in Burning Woods as set out in the above guide. She hailed him, asked "what action?" and he gave her the note and the first part of the quest. It worked perfectly.

Edited, Dec 29th 2009 4:34pm by Wertaf
____________________________
â€œNo one would come. They didnâ€™t believe me â€˜n Jasper. Well, they might have believed me but Jasper couldnâ€™t hold his tongue and told a story that even I didnâ€™t believe and I knew which parts were true.â€...from The Secret of Moon Magic by Raya
▲ Page top
closest vendor
QuoteReply
# Mar 12 2007 at 12:50 AM Rating: Decent
Soulglade
View User Forum
Scholar
141 posts
Innkeep Palola is NW of the bankers in a narrow and awkward corridor under and awning and therefore North of the Hogcaller's Inn. Farther away but less turns so I made better time on a drogmor. 14 seconds travel time

Innkeep Rille and Innkeep Evalona are both in the Jade Tiger Inn kind of near the entrance area and South of the Hogcaller's Inn. Closer in distance but more awkward turns on a fast drogmor. Ran into walls. 17 seconds travel time

# Aug 13 2006 at 11:54 PM Rating: Decent

Innkeeper Nasumi is in EAST Freeport, in the Freeport Inn. Muffins are a bargain at 7c each.
▲ Page top
Hee ya go
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2004 at 8:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591808472792
2 posts
I bought them in East Commonlands, from the INN #2, Name is Innkeep Juna, she sells them. And as for the turn in. I did 4 stacks on 1, and it worked.

If you are doing it JUST for faction, just repete the turnin over and over again.

If you are looking for another quest (where he must leave)

say- " I got them from Brownloe Bakery"

He will then roll out and will return in about 2 real life minutes.

(in that time you can go down hall and get the Hog Key #2) next to last room on the right.
Last rom is locked.

And that is how ya do it. :)
▲ Page top

I too am in need of muffins to raise faction for the druid epic, and i have checked out all the locations i can think of in search of them. If anyone an please tell me where i may buy muffins CURRENTLY i would be in their debt. I hear it has something to do with the bert plague in the karanas. If noone knows a location to buy them, i am on the quellious server, and will pay well for some baker to whip me up about a thousand of them. Send a tell to Nhogri or to Numlaar thanks.

if you combine 2 muffins in a kiln with a small block of clay and a small gizmo you get a [muffin generator], which pumps out four muffins every time u put a clump of dough in it.
